posts.title: A Symphony in Code
posts.text: Hey tech fellas! 👋 I’m Bibit Kunwar Chhetri, your go-to tech explorer currently rocking the Software Engineering student life at Gandaki College of Engineering and Science (GCES) in the charming town of Pokhara. Armed with my trusty keyboard and an unstoppable curiosity, I’m on a journey into Linux, System Administration, System Programming, AI, and the vast landscapes of research. Quick learner? You got it – Google and I are practically BFFs. I’m all about those open source vibes, finding joy in the intricate dance of Linux, orchestrating symphonies in System Programming, and boldly going into the uncharted territories of AI. Procrastination? Not on my watch. Perfectionism? Yep, that’s my guiding star. When I’m not lost in the tech wizardry, catch me buried in books, serenading my keyboard with the sweet tunes of code, and daydreaming of a world where fiction and reality do a happy dance together. This digital haven, my cozy spot since 2020, is where I spill the beans on: Cracking the code on machine learning, deep learning, and computer science theories. Putting algorithms to work on real-world problems because, let’s face it, theory’s cool, but application’s cooler. Flexing my tech muscles with independent research projects and personal victories – just the musings of a code wanderer on a digital pilgrimage.

pages.title: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
pages.text: Terms of ServiceIntroductionWelcome to Bibit Kunwar Chhetri’s Free and Open Source Blog! By accessing this website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions of use. If you disagree with any part of these terms, please do not use this website. CopyLeft and SharingThis blog is released under the principles of the GNU General Public License (GPL). You are free to view, modify, and share the content of this blog, subject to the conditions of the GPL. Intellectual Property and CopyrightThe content on this blog, including text, images, and other materials, is copyrighted by Bibit Kunwar Chhetri and is released under the terms of the GPL. You are free to copy, distribute, and modify the content as long as you attribute the work to Bibit Kunwar Chhetri. Personal ResponsibilityThe information provided on this blog is for general informational purposes only. It does not constitute professional advice. You are solely responsible for how you use the information presented on this blog. Comments and ContributionsWe encourage respectful and constructive discussions in the comments section. Contributions to the blog are also welcomed, following the guidelines of the GPL. External LinksThis blog may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of these external sites. Changes to TermsWe reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. By continuing to use the site after changes are posted, you accept the modified terms. Privacy PolicyInformation CollectionWe may collect personal information, such as your name and email address, when you voluntarily submit it, for example, when leaving comments or subscribing to newsletters. Use of InformationAny personal information you provide will be used solely for the purpose for which it was collected. We will not sell or share your information with third parties without your consent. CookiesThis blog may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. You can disable cookies in your browser settings if you prefer. AnalyticsWe may use analytics services to track and analyze user behavior on this website. This information is used to improve the content and user experience. SecurityWe take reasonable measures to protect your personal information. However, we cannot guarantee the security of information transmitted over the internet. Contact InformationIf you have any questions or concerns about these terms or the privacy policy, you can contact Bibit Kunwar Chhetri at kunwar.bibit7@gmail.com. This blog is released under the GNU General Public License.
